description_long: This is a highly stylized axe with a dark, metallic head featuring multiple sharp, angular blades and red accents. The axe head is adorned with pointed, silver-gray spikes and geometric cutouts, giving it an aggressive, fantasy-inspired appearance. The handle is long, slender, and appears to be made of a dark material, possibly wood or composite, with metallic fittings at both ends. The lower end of the handle is capped with a matching metallic and red geometric design, echoing the motif of the axe head. The overall construction suggests a blend of ornamental and functional design, with a focus on visual impact. The color palette is dominated by dark gray, silver, red, and some gold highlights, contributing to a menacing and high-contrast look.
description: A fantasy-inspired axe with a dark, spiked metallic head, red accents, and a long, slender handle featuring matching geometric designs. The design is aggressive and ornamental, with sharp edges and bold color contrasts.
description_view_0: The axe head's angular blades and red accents are prominent, with the handle's lower geometric cap visible.
description_view_1: The side profile highlights the layered construction of the axe head and the slim, dark handle.
description_view_2: The top-down view emphasizes the symmetry of the blade arrangement and the pointed spikes.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the back of the axe head and the full length of the handle, with the end cap clearly visible.
attribute_handle_type: Long, slender, and straight handle, likely wood or composite, with a dark finish and metallic geometric end cap; round cross-section with minimal grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Multi-edged, angular metallic blade with pointed spikes, geometric cutouts, and red decorative accents; no beard, with a pronounced poll and ornamental features.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite mounting with the blade integrated into the handle using metallic fittings.
